title: Explore New Features in Photoshop | Adobe
metaDescription: Explore Photoshop’s new amazing image-editing features for everything from simple to retouching to expressive artwork — and so much more.

og.title: Explore New Features in Photoshop | Adobe
og.description: Explore Photoshop’s new amazing image-editing features for everything from simple to retouching to expressive artwork — and so much more.

headings.text: New features are rolling out all the time to make Photoshop faster and smarter.
Tidy up messy layers in a click.
New adjustment layers: Clarity & Dehaze, and Grain.
Go bigger and sharper with Topaz Labs.
Make dramatic edits and fine-tune adjustments.

landmarks.innerText:
Home
/
Adobe Creative Cloud
/
Adobe Photoshop
/
Features

Photoshop

Explore new Adobe Photoshop features.

Learn all about the tools and techniques you can use to create gorgeous photos, rich graphics, and incredible art.

Update Photoshop

What’s new
Image adjustments
Retouch
Add and remove objects
Paint and draw
New features are rolling out all the time to make Photoshop faster and smarter.
Explore new angles faster.

Mock up new directions quickly with Rotate Object. Tilt, rotate, and scale objects in real time — without rebuilding all the details.

Tidy up messy layers in a click.

Organize your stack with Layer Cleanup. Automatically add descriptive labels and remove empty layers. Declutter quickly so you can hand off files with clarity.

New adjustment layers: Clarity & Dehaze, and Grain.

Now you can adjust texture, atmosphere, and sharpness nondestructively right in the Layers panel, and apply masks for pinpoint control.

Go bigger and sharper with Topaz Labs.

Upscale images with unmatched power and flexibility using partner AI models from Topaz Labs in Photoshop. Instantly boost quality, clarity, and sharpness.

Generative composition with Harmonize.

Instantly blend people and objects into any background. Harmonize matches the lighting, shadows, colors, and other details for a seamless scene in seconds.

Ideate in Firefly Boards.

Generate multiple images and iterations all on one canvas in Firefly Boards. Then take your images further, refining them with precise tools in Photoshop.

Membership plans

Get Photoshop.

Start with just Photoshop, or get Photoshop and 20+ other apps with the Creative Cloud Pro plan.

Individuals
Students and teachers
Teams

Unlimited access to standard creative AI image and vector features like Text to Image and Generative Fill
4,000 monthly generative credits for premium creative AI video and audio features like Text to Video
Unlimited access to Firefly Boards for exploring ideas and developing storyboards
Access to non-Adobe Generative AI models in Firefly
Adobe Express Premium, Frame.io for Creative Cloud, tutorials, fonts, templates, and 100GB of cloud storage
